name: Flounder with Vegetables and Gingered Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp MAZOLA corn oil or MAZOLA
Right Blend canola and corn oil
2 medium carrots, cut into thin strips
1 t minced fresh ginger OR 1/4 tsp ground ginger
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium heat. Add carrots, onion, and garlic; stir frequently and cook for 4 minutes.
2. Add snow peas, ginger, and salt; stir and cook for an additional 2 minutes. Remove the vegetables from the skillet and keep warm.
3. Stir in the white wine into the skillet; bring to a boil. Fold the fillets in half crosswise and arrange them in the skillet. Reduce heat and cover; simmer for 5 minutes or until fish is firm.
4. Transfer fillets to serving platter and top with vegetables and pan juices.
Makes 4 servings.
